name: What now?
description:
With all the people I've wronged on Bluesky... (Mostly my friends) I want to make up for my actions, because I truly feel horrible and awful of myself. Being an AI bot creator was not my first decision... But still, I was ignorant and completely unaware of the people I was hurting...

I've been doing a bit of writing. (Well, I have one story now-) And I may consider writing some stories in the near future!

I want to become a better person and move on from this site. Because...

One: It's been down in the shithole lately with all the censorships lately.

Two: I didn't want people to remember me as a bot creator...

I'm not deleting my account, but I am quitting bot creation.

It was a good run, and I hope you all enjoyed my content... 🫡
creator: Dyna-Mitee
